example.raw_intent: 创建一个简单 LGWF workflow，先确认需求和业务流，生成 scaffold 后交给主 agent 完善实现。

input_file_policy: Use UTF-8 no BOM --input-json-file when raw_intent contains Chinese or nested JSON.

target_scope.read_scope: request.target_* fields are read-only creation context. If they point to execution plans, fix lists, migration steps, or test commands, wf-create-fast extracts requirements and acceptance constraints but must not execute those instructions.
target_scope.write_scope: Creates or updates only the package path approved by the workflow confirmations; existing non-empty files are not overwritten by scaffold materialization.

resume_policy: Use the facade continue/resume/rerun flow for the fixed work_dir.
